tasks.name: Setup unified experiment codebase
tasks.description: Create a modular training codebase with: (1) WD method implementations (Fixed, SWD, CWD, CPR, CAWD, EqWD) as pluggable modules, (2) per-layer diagnostic logging (r_t, delta_hat_t, lambda_t, weight norms), (3) CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet data loaders with standard augmentation, (4) DDP-compatible training loop with mixed precision support, (5) checkpoint saving and metric export to JSON. All methods share a single training script with method selection via config.

pilot.pass_criteria: Code runs without errors on CIFAR-10 for 2 epochs with all 7 WD methods

tasks.name: Pilot: EqWD signal validation on CIFAR-10/VGG-16-BN
tasks.description: Run 50-epoch pilot on CIFAR-10 with VGG-16-BN to validate EqWD ratio deviation signal. Test Fixed WD, SWD, CWD, and EqWD (beta=0.5, 1.0, 2.0). Log per-layer r_t, delta_hat_t, lambda_t every 10 steps. Go/no-go: (1) ratio deviation variance > 0.01, (2) no divergence, (3) accuracy within 2% of fixed WD, (4) distinct per-layer behavior across methods.

pilot.pass_criteria: EqWD ratio deviation variance > 0.01 AND accuracy within 2% of fixed WD AND no divergence

visualizations.description: Per-layer ratio r_t trajectories under each WD method
EqWD effective WD lambda_t over training

tasks.name: Pilot: EqWD on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20
tasks.description: Run 50-epoch pilot on CIFAR-10 with ResNet-20 (0.27M params) to validate EqWD on a smaller architecture. Same methods and diagnostics as VGG pilot. Validates that ratio deviation signal is architecture-independent.

pilot.pass_criteria: EqWD ratio deviation variance > 0.01 AND accuracy within 2% of fixed WD

tasks.name: Pilot analysis and go/no-go decision
tasks.description: Analyze pilot results from both architectures. Compute ratio deviation statistics, compare accuracy across methods, generate diagnostic plots. Make go/no-go decision for full experiments. If GO: select best beta value for full experiments. If NO-GO: diagnose failure mode and report.

tasks.name: Full: CIFAR-100/ResNet-20, all 7 methods, 3 seeds
tasks.description: Run 200-epoch training on CIFAR-100 with ResNet-20 for all 7 WD methods (No-WD, Fixed, SWD, CWD, CPR, CAWD, EqWD) with seeds 42, 123, 456. SGD+momentum 0.9, cosine LR from 0.1, batch 128. Log per-layer diagnostics every 10 steps. Save checkpoints at epoch 100 and 200. Total: 21 runs. With 4 parallel on 4 GPUs, ~5 waves.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 21 runs complete without errors; EqWD mean accuracy >= Fixed WD mean accuracy - 0.5%

visualizations.description: CIFAR-100/ResNet-20 results: 7 methods x 3 seeds (mean +/- std)
Training loss curves for all methods on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20

tasks.name: Full: CIFAR-100/VGG-16-BN, all 7 methods, 3 seeds
tasks.description: Run 200-epoch training on CIFAR-100 with VGG-16-BN for all 7 WD methods with seeds 42, 123, 456. Same setup as ResNet-20 but with VGG-16-BN (15M params). Total: 21 runs. Critical for multi-architecture coverage in the paper.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 21 runs complete without errors; results consistent with ResNet-20 trends

visualizations.description: CIFAR-100/VGG-16-BN results: 7 methods x 3 seeds (mean +/- std)

tasks.name: Alignment informativeness diagnostic (H3)
tasks.description: Prerequisite diagnostic: test whether delta_hat_t (cosine similarity) contains information beyond (||g_t||, ||w_t||). Run single training run per architecture-dataset pair (ResNet-20/CIFAR-100, VGG-16-BN/CIFAR-100) logging delta_hat_t, ||g_t||, ||w_t|| per layer every 10 steps. Compute k-NN MI estimate I(delta_hat_t; test_acc | ||g_t||, ||w_t||) with 1000 bootstrap samples. If CI includes 0 for >=3/4 settings, alignment-aware WD is theoretically unjustified.

visualizations.description: AIS heatmap by layer and training phase

tasks.name: Ablation: EqWD beta sensitivity
tasks.description: Run EqWD with beta in {0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0} on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20, seed 42, 200 epochs. Determines sensitivity of EqWD to the adaptation strength hyperparameter. If performance varies >1% across beta, practical adoption suffers.

visualizations.description: Beta sensitivity: test accuracy vs. beta value

tasks.name: Ablation: EMA decay rate sensitivity
tasks.description: Run EqWD with EMA alpha in {0.8, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99} on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20, seed 42, 200 epochs. Tests how the equilibrium tracking speed affects performance.

visualizations.description: EMA decay sensitivity: test accuracy vs. alpha

tasks.name: Ablation: Layer-type-aware vs. uniform EqWD (H4)
tasks.description: Run EqWD in two modes on CIFAR-100/VGG-16-BN, 3 seeds: (1) uniform — same EqWD formula for all layers, (2) layer-type-aware — ratio-only for BN-preceded layers, ratio+alignment for non-BN layers. Also compute SNR of delta_hat_t in BN vs. non-BN layers. Tests the contrarian's hypothesis that alignment is uninformative for normalized layers.

visualizations.description: SNR of alignment signal in BN vs. non-BN layers
Layer-type-aware vs. uniform EqWD accuracy comparison

tasks.name: Ablation: VGG-16 (no BN) vs. VGG-16-BN
tasks.description: Run all 7 methods on CIFAR-100/VGG-16 (WITHOUT batch normalization) with 3 seeds to test whether the Phi invariance phenomenon depends on BN. Compare accuracy spread across methods for VGG-16 vs. VGG-16-BN. Prior iteration had only 2/7 methods tested — this time we must test ALL 7.

visualizations.description: NoBN ablation: VGG-16 vs. VGG-16-BN across all 7 methods

tasks.name: CIFAR results analysis and visualization
tasks.description: Aggregate all CIFAR-100 results (ResNet-20, VGG-16-BN, ablations). Compute BEM, CSI, AIS, C_T for all methods. Generate Tables 1, 3, 5 and Figures 2-6, 10. Produce per-layer diagnostic visualizations. Write results summary for paper integration.

visualizations.description: All CIFAR diagnostic figures (ratio trajectories, WD heatmaps, C_T scatter, beta curve, SNR bars)

tasks.name: ImageNet 1-epoch sanity check
tasks.description: Run a 1-epoch ImageNet/ResNet-50 training with DDP on 2 GPUs to verify: (1) data loading works, (2) DDP initializes correctly, (3) loss decreases within 1 epoch, (4) GPU memory fits batch 256/GPU with mixed precision, (5) diagnostic logging works at scale. This prevents repeating past failures of 'two iterations of blind failure on ImageNet'. If OOM: try batch 128, then 64. Log full error traces.

pilot.pass_criteria: 1 epoch completes without OOM/crash AND loss decreases AND DDP gradient sync verified

tasks.name: Full: ImageNet/ResNet-50, 6 methods, 3 seeds (PRIMARY)
tasks.description: Run 90-epoch ImageNet training with ResNet-50 for 6 WD methods (Fixed, SWD, CWD, CPR, CAWD, EqWD) with seeds 42, 123, 456. DDP on 2 GPUs, batch 256/GPU (effective 512), step LR (decay at 30/60/80), mixed precision. Total: 18 runs. Run 4 concurrently (4 runs x 2 GPUs = 8 GPUs). Save checkpoints at epoch 30, 60, 80, 90. Log per-layer diagnostics every 100 steps. THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT EXPERIMENT — it provides the primary evidence for the paper.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 18 runs complete; ResNet-50 Top-1 accuracy for fixed SGDW >= 75.5% (sanity check); EqWD achieves >= 0.2% improvement over fixed WD

visualizations.description: ImageNet/ResNet-50 results: 6 methods x 3 seeds (Top-1, Top-5 mean +/- std)
ImageNet training curves for all methods
Per-layer effective WD heatmap on ImageNet (representative run)

tasks.name: ImageNet results analysis and visualization
tasks.description: Aggregate ImageNet results. Compute Top-1, Top-5, BEM, CSI for all methods. Generate Table 2, Figures 7-8. Compare with CIFAR results for consistency. This analysis directly feeds into the paper's primary evidence section.

tasks.name: Control: Phase-schedule replay
tasks.description: Record the average lambda_t trajectory from EqWD (best run) and replay it as a deterministic schedule with fixed WD at each step. If this matches EqWD accuracy, the adaptive mechanism is not needed — a pre-computed schedule suffices. CIFAR-100/ResNet-20, 3 seeds.

tasks.name: Control: Gradient-norm-only ratio replacement
tasks.description: Replace ratio deviation |r_t - r*|/r* with normalized gradient norm ||g_t||/max(||g_t||) as EqWD's modulation signal. If this matches EqWD accuracy, the weight norm information in the ratio is not incrementally useful. CIFAR-100/ResNet-20, 3 seeds.

tasks.name: Control: Noise injection into alignment signal
tasks.description: Add Gaussian noise with sigma = std(delta_hat_t) to the alignment signal in CAWD. If noisy-CAWD matches clean-CAWD accuracy, the precise alignment value is not important (only its sign matters, supporting CWD). CIFAR-100/ResNet-20, 3 seeds.

tasks.name: Final comprehensive analysis and paper figures
tasks.description: Aggregate ALL results (CIFAR + ImageNet + ablations + controls + budget equivalence). Generate all paper tables and figures. Compute final hypothesis verdicts (H1-H7). Write comprehensive results summary for paper writing stage. Visually verify all generated figures.

metadata.parallelism_strategy: CIFAR tasks (1 GPU each) run 4 concurrent on GPUs 0-3; ImageNet tasks (2 GPU DDP each) run 4 concurrent on GPUs 0-7; ablations can fill remaining GPUs during ImageNet runs
evolution_lessons_addressed: ImageNet experiments now mandatory and on critical path (task imagenet_resnet50_full)
Multi-architecture: VGG-16-BN is a separate full task, not optional
NoBN ablation covers ALL 7 methods (not just 2)
ImageNet sanity check prevents blind failure
Statistical power: N=3 seeds for all core experiments
Figures vs. text consistency: analysis tasks include visual verification
